memory:memory/2026-04-29.md:1:45.snippet: # 2026-04-29 - AI Cost Estimator Development ## Context Ryland wants to build the first AI cost-estimating tool for Gulf Coast custom home construction. Aimed to overquote by ~10-15% instead of underquoting. Using Crabtree house as the template house to develop the pricing system. ## Current Attempt to Get Pricing Data Started with the Crabtree floor plan images but the pricing documents aren't processing due to missing sharp dependency for image processing. Multiple images sent but system can't extract the numbers automatically. ## What We'll Build A comprehensive cost estimating system that calculates from components up (not sq ft averages), includes: - Structure calculations by sq ft/s

memory:memory/2026-04-30.md:1:11.snippet: # 2026-04-30 ## Durable notes - Ryland wants direct, fast iteration on Triumph Homes web copy/UI and estimator functionality. - Branding/copy preference updates applied repeatedly today: use “Triumph Homes Inc”; remove “Grand Bay” from the main marketing statement (service area phrasing centered on Mobile and Baldwin County). - Estimator direction clarified: plan-upload workflow must support PDF-driven takeoff for drywall, brick, and windows/doors with confidence scoring; goal is accurate, house-specific quantities rather than generic sqft scaling. - User explicitly prefers actual window/door unit counts (schedule quantity logic) over raw tag counting. - Brick takeoff trust issue identified
